title: MEDICARE.GOV - 211info
text: CENTERS FOR MEDICARE & MEDICAID SERVICES MEDICARE.GOV Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Website provides information on all aspects of Medicare, including how to apply, find and compare healthcare providers, make address changes and resolve Medicare card issues, get help with costs, find out how Medicare works with other insurance, and report Medicare fraud. The website also provides information on nursing homes, hospitals, home health services, and medical equipment suppliers. Phone line assists with Medicare billing questions and questions about claims, records, and expenses. 7500 Security Boulevard Baltimore, MD 21244 Eligibility: Age 65 and older and adults with disabilities Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week - (800) 633-4227 1-800 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Toll-free (800) 633-4227 1-800-MEDICARE TTY/TTD (877) 486-2048 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Health Insurance Claims Assistance for Beneficiaries * Medicare Beneficiaries Insurance Fraud Reporting Medicare Medicare Information/Counseling Physician Referrals * Medicare Beneficiaries Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - MEDICAID.GOV HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - ONLINE DENTIST LOCATOR If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CENTERS FOR MEDICARE & MEDICAID SERVICES
